debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
⊢ MaxDegreeLE (@Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM') 2

failed_attempts:
rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    simp only [IsMatching.restrict₂, Graph.loopRemove_inc, Graph.restrict_inc] at he
    obtain ⟨⟨heMM', heGv⟩, _⟩ := he
    cases heMM' with
    | inl heM => exact Or.inl ⟨heM.1, heGv⟩
    | inr heM' => exact Or.inr ⟨heM'.1, heGv⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by norm_num

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v hv
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    simp only [restrict₂, loopRemove_inc, restrict_inc] at he
    obtain ⟨⟨hGe, hsd⟩, _, hve⟩ := he
    cases hsd with
    | inl hsd =>
      cases hsd with
      | inl hm => left; exact ⟨hm, hve⟩
      | inr hm' => right; exact ⟨hm'.1, hve⟩
    | inr hsd =>
      cases hsd with
      | inl hm' => right; exact ⟨hm', hve⟩
      | inr hm => left; exact ⟨hm.1, hve⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by ring

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v hv
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    simp only [restrict₂, loopRemove_inc, restrict_inc, symmDiff_def] at he
    rcases he.1.1 with hMem | hMem'
    · left; exact ⟨hMem, he.1.2⟩
    · right; exact ⟨hMem', he.1.2⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by norm_num

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v hv
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    simp only [restrict₂, loopRemove_inc, restrict_inc] at he
    obtain ⟨⟨heMM', heGv⟩, _⟩ := he
    cases heMM' with
    | inl heM => exact Or.inl ⟨heM.1, heGv⟩
    | inr heM' => exact Or.inr ⟨heM'.1, heGv⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by norm_num

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v hv
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    simp only [IsMatching.restrict₂, loopRemove_inc, restrict_inc, symmDiff_def] at he
    rcases he.1.1 with hMem | hMem
    · left; exact ⟨hMem.1, he.1.2⟩
    · right; exact ⟨hMem.1, he.1.2⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by norm_num

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v hv
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    simp only [restrict₂, loopRemove_inc, restrict_inc, mem_symmDiff] at he
    rcases he with ⟨⟨hMM', hGe⟩, _, hv'⟩
    rcases hMM' with hM'' | hM''
    · left; exact ⟨hM''.1, hv'⟩
    · right; exact ⟨hM''.1, hv'⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by norm_num

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e ⟨w, hw⟩
    simp only [restrict₂, loopRemove_inc, restrict_inc] at hw
    cases hw.1.1 with
    | inl hMem => left; exact ⟨hMem, w, hw.2⟩
    | inr hMem => right; exact ⟨hMem, w, hw.2⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by norm_num

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v hv
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    simp only [restrict₂, loopRemove_inc, restrict_inc] at he
    obtain ⟨⟨hMM', hGe⟩, _⟩ := he
    cases hMM' with
    | inl hMnM' => exact Or.inl ⟨hMnM'.1, hGe⟩
    | inr hM'nM => exact Or.inr ⟨hM'nM.1, hGe⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by norm_num

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v _
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e he
    simp only [restrict₂, loopRemove_inc, restrict_inc, mem_symmDiff] at he
    rcases he.1.1 with heMM' | heM'M
    · left; exact ⟨heMM'.1, he.1.2⟩
    · right; exact ⟨heM'M.1, he.1.2⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)

rw [maxDegreeLE_iff']
  intro v hv
  rw [eDegree_eq_encard_inc]
  have h1 : E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v) ⊆ E(G ↾ (M ∆ M'), v) := by
    intro e he
    exact ⟨he.1.1, he.2⟩
  have h2 : E(G ↾ (M ∆ M'), v) ⊆ (M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v)) := by
    intro e ⟨⟨hG, hMM'⟩, w, hw⟩
    cases hMM' with
    | inl hM => left; exact ⟨hM.1, w, hw⟩
    | inr hM' => right; exact ⟨hM'.1, w, hw⟩
  calc E(hM.restrict₂ hM', v).encard 
      ≤ E(G ↾ (M ∆ M'), v).encard := encard_le_encard h1
    _ ≤ ((M ∩ E(G, v)) ∪ (M' ∩ E(G, v))).encard := encard_le_encard h2
    _ ≤ (M ∩ E(G, v)).encard + (M' ∩ E(G, v)).encard := encard_union_le _ _
    _ ≤ 1 + 1 := add_le_add (hM.degree_le_one v) (hM'.degree_le_one v)
    _ = 2 := by norm_num
